subcodes.first_line: O celestial herald of glad tidings! Thy letter, replete with uplifting allusions and couched in the utmost eloquence and clarity, unfolded the mysteries and served as proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سروش پربشارت نامه خوش اشارت در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت بیان اسرار بود و دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @music and singing
